description: Advicement provides DynamicDocs, a service for generating PDF documents from JSON data and LaTeX-based or prebuilt templates. It also offers an Excel add-in for creating PDFs from spreadsheet workflows via the same backend service.
summary: advicement.io exposes one documented REST API for DynamicDocs PDF generation and one downloadable Excel add-in that calls that API; both use the same account-generated Adv-Security-Token API key.
